description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, ballets work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge.Product DetailsBallet style covering at the toe in red A multi- coloured midfoot fabric strap with a tang clasp and a heel collar Striped, soft footbedTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareCanvasWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
